Future research and clinical practice should incorporate mechanisms for re-evaluating prior decisions and support the development of PDAs for liver disease.
items.conclusion: Cancer-related and surgical decision making contexts were the most frequent targets for SDM in this review. However, patient decision aids (PDAs) are currently unavailable for any liver disease
